scripts.db:add-user-id: wrangler d1 execute video-suggestor-db --local --command="ALTER TABLE posts ADD COLUMN user_id TEXT REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL"
scripts.db:add-user-id:remote: wrangler d1 execute video-suggestor-db --remote --command="ALTER TABLE posts ADD COLUMN user_id TEXT REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL"
scripts.db:add-status: wrangler d1 execute video-suggestor-db --local --command="ALTER TABLE posts ADD COLUMN status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'published'"
scripts.db:add-status:remote: wrangler d1 execute video-suggestor-db --remote --command="ALTER TABLE posts ADD COLUMN status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'published'"
scripts.db:add-made: wrangler d1 execute video-suggestor-db --local --command="ALTER TABLE posts ADD COLUMN made INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0"
scripts.db:add-made:remote: wrangler d1 execute video-suggestor-db --remote --command="ALTER TABLE posts ADD COLUMN made INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0"
